{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Penetrators
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Penetrators]] are short-range boarding devices used by the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Each Penetrator comes standard with a crew of twenty-four [[Pawns]], one Sentry, one [[Shepherd]], and optionally a [[Reaver]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
